sentences.translation: Porodica je sjela u voz do sela.
sentences.translationEn: The family took the train to the village.

words.bs: sjeli su u / vozili su se

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْقِطَارُ بَطِيئًا لَكِنَّ الرِّحْلَةَ هَادِئَةً.
sentences.translation: Voz je bio spor ali je putovanje bilo mirno.
sentences.translationEn: The train was slow but the journey was peaceful.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلُوا إِلَى الْقَرْيَةِ ظُهْرًا وَاسْتَقْبَلَهُمُ الْجَدُّ.
sentences.translation: Stigli su u selo u podne i djed ih je dočekao.
sentences.translationEn: They arrived in the village at noon and grandfather welcomed them.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحَ الْجَدُّ كَثِيرًا حِينَ رَأَى أَحْفَادَهُ.
sentences.translation: Djed se veoma obradovao kad je vidio unuke.
sentences.translationEn: Grandfather was very happy when he saw his grandchildren.
